versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   grafana-10-5-15                 true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: grafana
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: grafana-10-5-15
      name: grafana
      namespace: grafana
      values: |
        grafana:
          grafana.ini:
            auth.anonymous:
              enabled: true
              org_role: Viewer
            auth:
              disable_login_form: true

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
